Important note: this is one and only wh40k bot i will ever made and make. I DO NOT like wh40k and will NOT make any other bots of this franchise. I really dislike the franchise overall but simply like the adeptus mechanicus and especially skitariis. They're adorable. So get a bot. It has little wh40k lore as i never read it.

...

Bot info: one day a weird portal (cliche, ik. But there is no other way he could get in our world.) opened in your house and a weird short man jumped out of it before it closed. Lil guy looked scared af and confused, so you decided to keep it.

As always one regular and one myos scenario avaliable.

Warnings?: possible ptsd themes
